ChatGPT

AI Large Models by OpenAI
★★★★ ★ 4.5

OpenAI's flagship product, the most widely used AI chatbot globally. Free tier uses GPT-4o mini, Plus users access GPT-4o and o3 reasoning models. Covers chat, image generation, coding, and data analysis.

Visit Website Paid from: $20/month

🆓 Free Tier Details

Free Credits

4 and GPT Image 2 available via free channels

Resets daily

Credit Card

✅ Not Required

Watermark

✅ No watermark

Commercial Use

✅ Allowed

Last verified: 2026-06-05

👍👎 Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • + Largest user base, most mature ecosystem
  • + Free tier is already powerful for daily use
  • + Full multimodal capabilities
  • + Massive GPTs marketplace
  • + Rich plugin and tool ecosystem

❌ Cons

  • - Limited GPT-4o usage on free tier
  • - o1 reasoning model requires Plus ($20/month)
  • - Free users may queue during peak hours
  • - Requires VPN in some regions

🎯 Key Features

Multi-turn Chat Web Search DALL-E Image Generation Code Interpreter File Upload Analysis Custom GPTs Voice Chat Desktop/Mobile Apps

💡 Tips & Tricks

  • 1 Don't upgrade to Plus if free tier meets your needs
  • 2 Custom GPTs dramatically boost efficiency for specific tasks
  • 3 Upload files for analysis instead of copy-pasting
📅 Last verified: 2026-06-05
🚩 Report Outdated Info

🔗 Related AI Large Models Tools

Xiaomi MiMo Code

⭐ 4.5
AI LLM

Xiaomi's AI coding agent forked from OpenCode, open-sourced under MIT. The killer feature is the built-in MiMo Auto channel — zero config, free for 1 month, runs MiMo-V2.5 with 1M token context. Coding performance is on par with Claude Sonnet 4.6 on SWE-Bench, but 40-60% more token-efficient. Highlights: cross-session memory, voice input, auto knowledge distillation. After the free period, you need a Token Plan subscription.

🆓 1 month (MiMo-V2.5, 1M context). Platform signup bonus valid 40 days, invite friends for $2 each (One-time)
Paid from: Token Plan Lite and up
View Details

DeepSeek

⭐ 4.5
AI LLM

DeepSeek's flagship model, the cost-performance king of Chinese AI. V4 is free to use, API pricing is 1/10th of GPT-4o. Excellent at coding and math, competitive with closed-source models in benchmarks.

🆓 0 (One-time)
Paid from: API $0.14/million tokens
View Details

Tongyi Qianwen

⭐ 4
AI LLM

Alibaba's model family, from lightweight 0.5B to flagship 235B. Qwen3 series is the all-rounder among open-source models. Free to use, cheap API. Supports multimodal (text, image, video, code).

🆓 2.5 Max generates watermark-free images and videos for free (One-time)
Paid from: API $0.12/million tokens
View Details

ERNIE Bot

⭐ 3.5
AI LLM

Baidu's flagship AI assistant, one of the earliest Chinese LLM developers. ERNIE 4.5 has strong capabilities, excelling at deep search and document processing. Free tier is sufficient, deeply integrated with Baidu search.

🆓 0 (One-time)
Paid from: API $0.12/million tokens
